title: DevBeast
description: A local-first DevOps control plane that gives developers structural visibility and high-speed control over their entire development stack.
about: DevBeast is a local-first DevOps control plane that gives developers structural visibility and high-speed control over their entire development stack — containers, databases, and services — in a single pane of glass.

problem.title: Modern development requires juggling multiple fragmented tools:
points: Portainer / Docker Desktop for managing containers and volumes.
pgAdmin / Adminer / DBeaver for database structural inspection and querying.
Scattered terminals for log streams, command runs, and open ports.
Mental mapping of network dependencies and database connections.

points.title: Unified Visibility
points.description: See your entire infrastructure in a single pane of glass.

points.title: Architectural Intelligence
points.description: Identify performance hotspots and structural volatility through manual, advisory-only insights.

points.title: Transparent Execution
points.description: No background "smart" loops. All schema migrations and optimizations are manual, explicit, and developer-verified.

points.title: High-Speed Control
points.description: Kill ports, restart containers, and restore backups in seconds.

pillars.title: Architecture
pillars.subtitle: Performance Insights
pillars.description: View aggregated performance patterns and structural volatility. Identify the slowest queries and most-impacted tables across your last 100 executions without background telemetry.

pillars.title: Auditor
pillars.subtitle: Audit & Migrations
pillars.description: Manual structural comparative analysis. Review schema diffs and preview migration SQL with explicit risk indicators before applying changes.

pillars.title: History
pillars.subtitle: Audit Logs
pillars.description: A transparent, searchable record of every segment executed. Audit execution times, affected rows, and table-level impact to debug regressions fast.

pillars.title: Library
pillars.subtitle: Snippets
pillars.description: A collection of SQL utility assets and favorites. Quickly re-use complex queries or structural templates without leaving the workspace.

workflows.title: Debug a Broken API
steps: Click on a failed service in the topological graph layout.
Instantly view the connected databases and specific schemas.
Trace network mappings and dependent tables.
Identify failing query paths via visual trace context.

workflows.title: Safe Schema Changes
steps: Propose your schema modification (e.g. ALTER TABLE or DROP).
View the computed Blast Radius showing affected services and downstream containers.
Review Optimization Insights: copy manual SQL suggestions (Add Index, Analyze) directly to editor.

workflows.title: Reset & Recover Fast
steps: Create idempotent backups with a single click before risky refactoring.
Wipe the public schema completely if structural collisions occur.
Reseed clean test data instantly via the Docker-based runner.

features: Idempotent backup & restore with one click

title: Legal Redline
description: AI-powered contract review and redlining tool that automatically flags risk, suggests compliant clauses, and accelerates negotiations.

title: BizOps
description: A unified platform that connects your entire business stack, automates cross-functional workflows, and provides real-time operational intelligence.
features: Unified dashboard for business-wide system integration
